issues.title: Corrupted doubled package names in 37/45 repos
fix_steps: Write script to detect doubled package names via regex ([a-z0-9][-a-z0-9]*)\1
Replace each doubled name with single correct name
Run uv lock in each affected repo
Fix root cause in unified-trading-pm/scripts/propagation/propagate-canonical-versions.py

issues.title: DISABLE_AUTH bypasses all API authentication with no production guard
fix_steps: Add production guard: if disable_auth and os.getenv('ENVIRONMENT') == 'production': raise RuntimeError
Better: remove DISABLE_AUTH entirely, use DI to inject NoOpAuthVerifier in dev

issues.title: ErrorRecoveryStrategy.DEAD_LETTER and ErrorCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR enum members missing
fix_steps: Add DEAD_LETTER = 'dead_letter' to ErrorRecoveryStrategy enum in both contracts repos
Change ErrorCategory.VALIDATION_ERROR to ErrorCategory.VALIDATION in base_adapter.py OR add VALIDATION_ERROR alias

issues.title: market-tick-data-service imports instruments-service as Python package
fix_steps: Identify which symbols MTDS imports from instruments-service
Extract shared types into unified-reference-data-interface
Remove instruments-service from MTDS pyproject.toml
Update MTDS imports to use unified-reference-data-interface

issues.title: 74 instances of exception details leaked to HTTP clients
fix_steps: Create safe_error_detail(e, status_code) utility in unified-trading-library
For 500s return 'Internal server error. Check server logs.'
Replace all detail=str(e) in 500-level handlers
Keep str(e) only for 4xx validation errors

issues.title: .env files tracked in git with real infrastructure details (13 repos)
files: 13 repos: see audit report for full list
fix_steps: For each repo: git rm --cached .env
Add .env to .gitignore
Ensure .env.example exists with placeholder values
Commit .gitignore change

issues.title: Hardcoded GCP project ID central-element-323112 in 30+ locations
fix_steps: In prod code: replace with config.gcp_project_id
In scripts: accept --project-id CLI arg
In tests: define TEST_PROJECT_ID = 'test-project-000000' in conftest.py
Search: rg 'central-element' --type py --glob '!.venv*' --glob '!archive/*'

issues.title: SQL injection via f-string table names
fix_steps: Validate table names against regex ^[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+$
Remove # noqa: S608 suppressions

issues.title: Swagger/OpenAPI docs enabled in all production FastAPI apps
fix_steps: In each FastAPI() constructor add: docs_url=None if settings.environment == 'production' else '/docs'
Same for redoc_url and openapi_url

issues.title: Orphan directory execution_service/ (stale leftover)
fix_steps: rm -rf execution_service/
